title: VideoMetadata
description: Per-video metadata extracted by the tutoring session pipeline.

video_id.description: Stable identifier derived from the filename stem (e.g. '1711656206762').

filename.description: Original filename of the source video.

pipeline_version.description: Version string of the processing pipeline.

processed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when processing was run.

duration_seconds.description: Total video stream duration in seconds.

audio_present.description: Whether an audio stream was found.

audio_channels.description: Number of audio channels (1 = mono, 2 = stereo).

audio_duration_seconds.description: Audio stream duration in seconds. Null if no audio.

audio_video_duration_mismatch.description: True if audio and video stream durations differ by more than 5 seconds.

audio_video_duration_delta_seconds.description: Absolute difference between video and audio durations in seconds. Null if no audio.

bitrate_kbps.description: Overall bitrate in kilobits per second.

composite_layout.description: Observations about the composite video layout.

screenshare_panel_count.description: Number of screenshare/work panels observed (0, 1, or 2).

screenshare_visible.description: Whether screensharing content was observed at any point in the video.

screenshare_platform.description: Identified platform being shared (e.g. 'saga', 'desmos', 'browser', 'unknown'). Null if no screenshare.

participants.description: Participants identified from visible name labels in webcam tiles.

display_name.description: Name as it appears on the webcam tile label. Null if not readable.

role_evidence.description: Brief description of evidence used for role assignment (e.g. 'label reads Tutor').

warnings.description: List of warnings, quality issues, or known limitations for this video.
